settings.title:
Your WordPress Site,
Powered by AI Agents

settings.editor: Give Claude, GPT, and Codex full control of your WordPress site through the Model Context Protocol. Content, Elementor, SEO, menus, media, AI generation — one plugin, every tool.
Explore 200+ Tools →View on GitHub

terminal
// Ask Claude to build your entire site
claude > "Create a landing page for our launch,
  add it to the nav, set SEO metadata,
  and generate a hero image with DALL-E"

✔ Page created — ID: 301
✔ Added to Primary Menu
✔ SEO title & description set
✔ Hero image generated & uploaded
From content management to AI image generation, MCPWP gives your agent the tools to handle any WordPress task.

◆

Content Management

Create, update, and manage pages, posts, and custom post types with bulk operations.

25+ tools
◈

Elementor Builder

Full Elementor control — read, write, clone pages, templates, global styles.

20+ tools
◊

SEO & Meta

Set titles, descriptions, focus keywords. Analyze SEO scores. Noindex flags.

8 tools

▸

Navigation & Menus

Create menus, add items, reorder, assign to theme locations. Full lifecycle.

15 tools
▲

Theme Builder

Manage header, footer, single, archive templates with display conditions.

10 tools
★

AI Generation

Generate images with DALL-E 3 & Gemini. Text-to-speech. Stock photos.

8 tools

◇

Security & API Keys

Scoped API keys, rate limiting, webhook subscriptions with delivery logs.

15 tools
◉

Media Library

Upload images, AI-powered alt text, describe images, manage attachments.

10 tools
▶

Multilingual

Language detection, translation management, multi-language workflows.

5 tools

settings.title: Up and Running in Three Steps

settings.editor:
01

Install the Plugin

Upload MCPWP to WordPress. Activate. That's it.

$ wp plugin install site-pilot-ai --activate
02

Connect Your AI

Point Claude Desktop, Codex, or any MCP client at your site's endpoint.

{ "mcpServers": { "wp": { "url": "https://your.site/wp-json/site-pilot-ai/v1/mcp" } } }
03

Start Building

Your AI now has 140+ tools. Create pages, manage SEO, generate images — all through conversation.

claude > "Build a portfolio with   5 project pages and   a contact form"

✔ Generate images with DALL-E 3 or Gemini Imagen 3
✔ Auto-generate alt text using AI vision models
✔ Convert any text to speech with ElevenLabs
✔ Search and download from 5M+ stock photos
✔ Set AI-generated featured images in one command
// Generate + set as featured image
wp_generate_featured_image({
  post_id: 301,
  prompt: "Modern SaaS dashboard",
  size: "1792x1024"
})

// AI-powered alt text
wp_generate_alt_text({
  attachment_id: 305,
  auto_save: true
})
